title: Pax Chizzik
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Pax}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Pax Chizzik |homeworld= |birth=c. [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]]According to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'', the events of ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' occur in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. In ''Dark Rendezvous'', Chizzik is stated to be eleven [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old, meaning his [[Reproduction/Legends|birth]] must have occurred in approximately [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]]. |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Tallisibeth, being a Jedi is about being resourceful, keeping your eyes open, and never, ever giving up. You taught me a lot about being a Jedi today.|Paz Chizzik to Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|}} '''Pax Chizzik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Jedi Initiate]] studying at the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Temple]] [[Jedi academy|academy]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Charismatic and popular, Chizzik had grown used to unwittingly using [[Mind trick/Legends|mind tricks]] to help him succeed. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], he [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|dueled]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|Tallisibeth "Scout" Enwandung-Esterhazy]] during the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament]]. After attempting to mind trick her into conceding, he managed to overpower her and believed he was victorious. However, he was tricked by Esterhazy and ended up losing, though he took his loss in stride. ==Biography== ===Learning to be a Jedi=== {{Quote|Did you recognize it, Scout?''"
"''What?''"
"''The Mrlssi half-hitch. The knot you taught me. I was feeling for you with the Force, you know, the way they teach us, and suddenly it was like I was making the Half-Hitch around you, but all in light."|Chizzik applied what he learned to his duel against Esterhazy|audio=MrlssiHalfHitch.flac|}} A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], Pax Chizzik was born around [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] and later [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the use of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Chizzik remained at the Temple, where he continued to grow skilled in the ways of the Force and [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]]. By [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],According to ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'', the events of ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', which include the [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]], occur in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]. As [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|Enwandung-Esterhazy]] having assisted Chizzik in practicing the knots is described as having occurred prior to the events of the novel, it must have occurred by 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]. while in [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Bear (Jedi)|Bear's]] [[Climbing and Ropework class]], orphaned [[Jedi]] apprentice [[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy|Tallisibeth "Scout" Enwandung-Esterhazy]] had assisted him in practicing the [[Twelve Intermediate Knots]], including the [[Mrlssi half-hitch]]. ===The Apprentice Tournament=== {{Quote|Well fought. This isn't going to mean they send you to the corps, is it?|Chizzik expresses sportsmanship, believing himself to have won|}} [[File:Tallisibeth_Enwandung-Esterhazy.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Chizzik dueled Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy (pictured) during the Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament.]] In 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]], [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] Chizzik participated in the annual [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]] overseen by Jedi Master [[Ilena Xan]], in which he had a chance of being selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] to a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] or Master. During the first round, he was set against Enwandung-Esterhazy, who had several ideas on how to beat Chizzik but disliked the idea of performing such feats against someone so young. As the [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] between the two began, both Enwandung-Esterhazy and Chizzik bowed to one another, with Chizzik remarking that he wished the former well in their combat—a statement she took as genuine. As the match began, Chizzik immediately clashed lightsabers with Enwandung-Esterhazy, laughing as he did so—which, in turn, prompted her to smile back. At this point, he began to [[Mind trick/Legends|Force-influence]] her, slowly convincing her that she should throw the match and allow him to win. However, a sniffle from [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] snapped Chizzik's opponent back to reality, allowing her to overcome his influence. Chizzik was then briefly overpowered by Enwandung-Esterhazy, with her utilizing her greater size and strength to push him back before he successfully parried against her. He then counter-attacked, nearly overpowering his opponent before pausing. Chizzik then confirmed to Enwandung-Esterhazy that he had felt his influence over her through the Force, comparing it to the Mrlssi half-hitch; however, Chizzik also stated that, while he used it to his advantage, it had been unintentional, claiming that he had never done it before. [[File:Yoda_Episode_I_Canon.png|thumb|left|300px|Jedi Grand Master Yoda (pictured) indirectly contributed to Chizzik's loss.]] After revealing this to Enwandung-Esterhazy, she dropped her lightsaber. Chizzik was initially confused, but quickly interpreted the gesture as one of surrender. He then approached her, stating his hope that she would not be sent to the [[Agricultural Corps/Legends|Agricultural Corps]] branch of the [[Jedi Service Corps/Legends|Jedi Service Corps]], and attempting to help her up in a show of good sportsmanship. However, Enwandung-Esterhazy took his gullibility to her advantage, putting him in a wrist lock and forcing him to his knees. She then released him, apologizing as their duel ended. ===After the tournament=== {{Quote|Are you all right, Chizzik?''"
"''My pride is a little bruised, but otherwise I'm fine.|Xan ensures Chizzik was unharmed in the duel|}} After the match, the [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] apprentice [[Hanna Ding]] rushed to Chizzik, coddling him while Master Xan asked if he was alright. Ding then demanded to Master Xan that Enwandung-Esterhazy be disqualified. However, Chizzik himself protested, stating that his opponent had acted within the rules, to which Xan agreed. In the following match between Ding and Enwandung-Esterhazy, Ding used her opponent's victory over Chizzik as a tool with which to taunt her. Enwandung-Esterhazy also tricked Ding at one point during the duel, lunging at Ding as she had with Chizzik before utilizing a different tactic afterward. Following Enwandung-Esterhazy's victory over Ding, Chizzik himself told her that she had taught him much about being a Jedi. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Combat to continue until one competitor surrenders, or receives three cuts. It's not Scout's fault I was dumb enough to forget the rules. She tricked me fair and square.|Chizzik admitted to a fair loss against Esterhazy|audio=PaxTrickedFair.flac|}} Well-liked at the Temple's [[Jedi academy|academy]], Chizzik was known to use his [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] to increase his likability.{{CSWECite|I|125|Chizzik, Pax}} He was a natural leader, intelligent, and had enormous spirit and charm. Enwandung-Esterhazy believed that he was "born to play a dashing prince in some romantic epic of the last age." Chizzik was also somewhat conceited, treating some challenges like a game under the assumption that he would be regarded by others as a great Jedi Knight, with tales told of his heroics. He was also gullible to an extent, falling for a trick performed against him by Enwandung-Esterhazy. Nonetheless, he was honorable, and accepted his defeat. ==Powers and abilities== [[File:JediTemple-Deceived.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Chizzik was trained in the Jedi arts at the Jedi Temple on Coruscant (pictured).]] Chizzik was strong in the Force. While he had exceptionally quick wrists, his footwork was not the best, and he was somewhat "chunky" with his movements. He was known to be extremely quick, capable of performing a fast parry, as well as being able to act rather imaginatively when attacking. Chizzik's manipulation over others, using the Force to make them act in his favor and like him, was believed to be unintentional; however, he still utilized it to his advantage, such as during his duel with Enwandung-Esterhazy. ==Equipment== While training in the Jedi temple, Chizzik wielded a [[Color/Legends|green]]-bladed [[Training lightsaber/Legends|training lightsaber]]. ==Behind the scenes== Pax Chizzik first appeared in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', written by [[Sean Stewart]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Pax Chizzik}} *''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book and [[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}} *[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (abridged audiobook)|''Yoda: Dark Rendezvous'' abridged audiobook]] ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Pax Chizzik |es=Pax Chizzik |pt=Pax Chizzik }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Chizzik, Pax}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]] [[Category:Males]]
